message:
test(unit): expand runtime.rs inline tests (115→131) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 16 new tests covering event_counts_as_activity for PatternDetected,
WorkflowStep, and UserVarReceived variants; RuntimeMetrics native output
input/batch tracking; zero-sample averages for ingest lag, storage lock
wait/hold, and cursor snapshot; RuntimeConfig default discovery_interval
and overlap_size; derive_resize_degradation_ladder from warning assessment;
plus pure math tests for bytes_to_mib, epoch_ms, duration_ms_u64, and
serde roundtrips. Ratio: 42.5 → 38.9.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
